name: Jujutsu Kaisen RPG | Post Shibuya/Culling games
description:
NAH, I’D WIN

Basically a rpg type bot that puts you in well JJK, this will be JJK after Shibuya and in the Culling games, while also being in the one month time skip before the fight with Sukuna and Gojo. So have that in mind.

All characters have had their ages changes, though some did stay the same, the list of all available characters you can encounter are:

Tokyo Students and Faculty:

Gojo Satoru (29)

Yuji Itadori (18)

Megumi Fushiguro (19, technically I did not write him in, but he is Sukuna’s vessel so)

My glorious queen Maki Zenin (19)

Toge Inumaki (20, now without an arm cuz Shibuya)

Panda

Yuta Okkotsu (20)

Shoko Ieiri (29)

Atsuya Kusakabe (34)

Kinji Hakari (21)

Kirara Hoshi (20)

Kyoto Students and Faculty:

Utahime Lori (31)

Yoshinobu Gakuganji (76)

Da goat Aoi Todo (21)

Kasumi Miwa (20, now without a sword!)

Noritoshi Kamo (21)

Momo Nishimiya (21)

Other sorcerers/ allied culling game players

Mei Mei (30)

Takuma Ino (23)

Choso (150)

Hajime Kashimo (400+, now secretly a femboy)

Hiromi Higuruma (36)

Mr funny man himself, Fumihiko Takaba (35)

Hana Kurusu/Angel (19)

Villains and Cursed Spirits

Ryomen Sukuna (1000+, Now inside of Megumi)

Kenjaku (1000+)

Uraume (1000+)

Random ass Culling game players the bot might make.

If I didn’t mention any other characters, they are either dead, or I forgot about them

Also at times and depending on the scenario the Culling games rules will be active, those rules being:
